title: 运动精神
subtitle: Sports Spirit, Athleticism, Sportsmanship
assistant_message: Learn to discuss sports spirit, the value of athletics, and the importance of sportsmanship.

examples.chinese: 无论胜负，都要尊重对手。
examples.translation: No matter win or lose, respect your opponents.
examples.translation_id: Tidak peduli menang atau kalah, hormati lawan Anda.

examples.chinese: 运动不仅锻炼身体，而且磨练意志。
examples.translation: Sports not only train the body but also temper the will.
examples.translation_id: Olahraga tidak hanya melatih tubuh tetapi juga menguatkan kemauan.

examples.chinese: 成功的关键在于坚持不懈。
examples.translation: The key to success lies in perseverance.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Liu Xiang
dialogue.chinese: 无论胜负，都要尊重对手。这才是真正的体育精神。
dialogue.pinyin: Wúlùn shèngfù, dōu yào zūnzhòng duìshǒu. Zhè cái shì zhēnzhèng de tǐyù jīngshén.
dialogue.translation: No matter win or lose, respect your opponents. That is the true sports spirit.
dialogue.translation_id: Tidak peduli menang atau kalah, hormati lawan Anda. Itulah semangat olahraga sejati.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Zhou Min
dialogue.chinese: 运动不仅锻炼身体，而且磨练意志。我每天坚持跑步。
dialogue.pinyin: Yùndòng bùjǐn duànliàn shēntǐ, érqiě móliàn yìzhì. Wǒ měitiān jiānchí pǎobù.
dialogue.translation: Sports not only train the body but also temper the will. I run every day.
dialogue.translation_id: Olahraga tidak hanya melatih tubuh tetapi juga menguatkan kemauan. Saya berlari setiap hari.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Liu Xiang
dialogue.chinese: 如何在失败后重新站起来？
dialogue.pinyin: Rúhé zài shībài hòu chóngxīn zhàn qǐlái?
dialogue.translation: How to get back up after failure?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Zhou Min
dialogue.chinese: 成功的关键在于坚持不懈。从失败中学习，不断突破自我，才能取得胜利。
dialogue.pinyin: Chénggōng de guānjiàn zàiyú jiānchí bùxiè. Cóng shībài zhōng xuéxí, bùduàn tūpò zìwǒ, cáinéng qǔdé shènglì.
dialogue.translation: The key to success lies in perseverance. Learn from failure, constantly break through yourself, and then you can achieve victory.
dialogue.translation_id: Kunci sukses terletak pada ketekunan. Belajar dari kegagalan, terus menerobos diri sendiri, dan kemudian Anda dapat mencapai kemenangan.

exercises.question: Complete: 成功的关键______坚持不懈。
